---
title: "Tamilore Okeleke"
description: | 
image: "IMG_3757.jpeg"
links:
  - label: GitHub
    url: "https://github.com/tamiokeleke"
  - label: Email
    url: "tammyokeleke@icloud.com"
output:
  postcards::trestles
site: distill::distill_website
---

I am a final-year student of Politics and International Relations with a focus on applied quantitative methods. My work centres on using data to better understand political institutions, global governance, and patterns of political behaviour. I am particularly interested in how statistical analysis and clear data visualisation can turn complex political questions into evidence-based insights. This website is part of that process a space to showcase reproducible research, refine how I communicate technical work to broader audiences, and experiment with presenting political analysis in a public-facing format.
